openvscode-ide.note: Topologia 2-camadas: nginx -> oauth2-proxy (4180, publico via loopback) -> openvscode (3000, expose-only na rede do compose, NAO exposto no host). port_registry.4180: openvscode-ide oauth2-proxy (prod, docker compose, EXCECAO range 3000-3999 — porta canonica do oauth2-proxy upstream; backend openvscode em :3000 e expose-only na rede docker)
